article_meta.title: Former President Donald Trump speaks at a campaign rally on April 27, 2023, in Manchester, New Hampshire

reasoning: The model avoided quoting errors but flagged questionable items, used non-standard bias labels, and missed several clearer instances in the author’s prose. Multiple labels are outside the allowed set, and some flagged items are weak or incorrect.

custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Several flagged items are weak or incorrect (e.g., alleged asymmetry in labeling, speculative story-choice claim). Only the Castro/Breitbart labels are arguably defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clearer author-prose bias such as ‘dramatic story,’ ‘no reason to believe him,’ ‘vague and unverified,’ and ‘people should treat his story with great skepticism.’
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-standard labels (e.g., ‘Labeling Bias,’ ‘Selection and Omission Bias,’ ‘Story Choice Bias’) instead of the defined types; misclassification across multiple items.
